name_en: New TRIOMPHE Classic Glossy Calfskin Shoulder Bag
name_cn:
New TRIOMPHE Classic Glossy Calfskin Shoulder Bag
Calfskin
Sheepskin lining
TRIOMPHE metal lock
1 interior flat pocket
Adjustable shoulder strap, min length 21 cm, max length 25 cm (The main difference from the classic model 194142 is the bottom design; this model has a wider, triangular bottom for double the capacity)
Model: 120553
Size: 24*8*11.5
